case_title: DAVID WONG VS. CAICERO VICTOR et al

DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---YEE WONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2014 IS CONTINUED TO APR-17-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF DAVID WONG APPEARS; DEFENDANT VICTOR CAICERO DBA ANTIGUA COFFEE SHOP DOES NOT APPEAR; DEFENDANT EVELYN SOZA DBA ANTIGUA COFFEE SHOP DOES NOT APPEAR. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT.506).

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. APPEARANCES BY (2) DEFENDANTS, ONLY. ACCORDING TO DEFENDANTS THEIR INSURANCE COMPANY HAS ALREADY PAID THE PLAINTIFF THREE WEEKS AGAO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
